prompt: Create a cinematic vertical photo of one energetic young adult female football fan/cheerleader in a packed stadium at night, shot from a low close-up angle from the seats as she turns sideways and leans forward with motion blur. She has long dark brown hair blowing in the wind, and her face is intentionally covered by a plain opaque gray square censor block. She wears a bright yellow sporty cheer outfit with exactly 2 visible clothing pieces: a short-sleeve cropped jersey top with dark green-and-white sleeve trim, and a matching pleated mini skirt with dark green-and-white side stripe accents. In her right hand she waves exactly 1 small Chinese national flag on a white pole, blurred by motion, with the red flag and yellow stars visible on the right side of the frame. The background is a huge football stadium filled with a dense crowd, glowing floodlights, misty haze, colorful bokeh, and a dramatic backlit halo around her hair. Use shallow depth of field, soft film grain, realistic skin and fabric texture, dynamic candid sports-event photography, high energy, celebratory atmosphere, slightly tilted composition, red stadium seats in the foreground, no readable text, no watermark.
